description: SIGTERM 触发 stop(30s)→ 拒新消息 / drain in-flight / deactivate;必须在 timeout 内完成,否则 K8s SIGKILL 兜底(丢任务)

then.sdkExpectedAction: step 1: set draining=true (reject new Kafka messages immediately); step 2: kafkaConsumer.wakeup() (interrupt poll); step 3: wait for in-flight drain up to (timeout * 0.4) = 12s; step 4: executor.awaitTermination up to (timeout * 0.6) = 18s; step 5: POST /deactivate (must succeed even if timeout exhausted); total must complete < 30s
sdkMustNot: skip /deactivate (orch heartbeat-timeout would clean up 120s later, but explicit deactivate is faster)
block stop() if /deactivate HTTP fails (log + continue exit)
